nodes.context: Italian-American crime group from Boston's North End, active 1960s-mid 1980s.
Mafia family; Angiulo brothers were made men in this family.
Irish Mob group that competed with Angiulo brothers for rackets.
Irish Mob group that competed with Angiulo brothers for rackets.

edges.evidence_quote: As "made men" in the Patriarca crime family, they were placed in control of the racketeering throughout Massachusetts
edges.context: Angiulo brothers were members of the Patriarca crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: until Irish Mob groups such as the Winter Hill Gang and the Charlestown Mob decided to run the rackets in their own neighborhoods
edges.context: Winter Hill Gang competed with Angiulo brothers for control of rackets.
